---
---

## Slide 1 - Inline image in paragraph

I think that I shall never see a poem lovely as a ![](../image.png){width=80px} tree, whose hungry mouth is prest against the earth's sweet flowing breast.

## Slide 2 - Multiple inline images

First ![](../image.png){width=40px} image and second ![](../image.png){width=40px} image in same paragraph.

## Slide 3 - Inline image alongside plain image

Some text with ![](../image.png){width=40px} an inline image.

![](../image.png)
